race.comment: ROYAL INFERENCE (3) was a fresh-up winner then has run well enough on the testing track at Mount Gambier in the last two. Loves the soft tracks and expected to go close. THE BANTAM (5) was below best last time in a tougher race but the start prior went close here running on hard. Gets a chance to atone. SPARKLES (6) was solid here fresh over the sharper trip then got off the mark with the maiden win at Wangaratta latest. Expected to be in the finish again. RUSSIAN RONI (2) was a winner in similar grade two back then safely held in tougher class latest. This easier and looks a strong winning hope. FULL COMMITMENT (11) wasn't far away last start. Ready to win and should be hard to hold out.
